Package com.sunilos.p4.bean

Class BaseBean

java.lang.Object
com.sunilos.p4.bean.BaseBean
All Implemented Interfaces:
DropdownListBean, Serializable, Comparable<BaseBean>
Direct Known Subclasses:
CollegeBean, CourseBean, EmployeeBean, FacultyBean, InsuranceBean, InterviewBean, MarksheetBean, ProductBean, RoleBean, StudentBean, SubjectBean, UserBean
public abstract class BaseBean extends Object implements Serializable, DropdownListBean, Comparable<BaseBean>
Parent class of all Beans in application. It contains generic attributes.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Deepak Vishwakarma
